target_title: GraphWalker: Agentic Knowledge Graph Question Answering via Synthetic Trajectory Curriculum
reasoning: The paper explicitly diagnoses a core gap—the lack of an exploration prior—and reframes KGQA training to target that constraint via a stage-wise SFT curriculum (gap-driven reframing). It also constructs large synthetic trajectory datasets (GraphSynth, GraphRoll) with constrained random walks and rejection sampling (data/benchmarking and data-centric sampling) and composes a multi-stage training pipeline (modular pipeline).
